'''zakate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bytewise|bytewise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-k-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bytewise|bytewise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zakate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zakate|zakate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zakatesher|zakatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zakatesherĂ«m|zakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zakatero|zakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zakateshĂ«|zakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zakateshĂ«m|zakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizakatero|gokizakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizakateshĂ«|gokizakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizakateshĂ«m|gokizakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozakankerom|gozakankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozakankeshĂ«|gozakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozakankeshĂ«m|gozakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozakankeya|gozakankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zakaterom|zakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zakatemu|zakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zakateya|zakateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizakaterom|gokizakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizakatemu|gokizakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizakateya|gokizakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zakakate|zakakate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zakakatesher|zakakatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zakakatesherĂ«m|zakakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zakakatero|zakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zakakateshĂ«|zakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zakakateshĂ«m|zakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizakakatero|gokizakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizakakateshĂ«|gokizakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizakakateshĂ«m|gokizakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozakakankerom|gozakakankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozakakankeshĂ«|gozakakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozakakankeshĂ«m|gozakakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozakakankeya|gozakakankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zakakaterom|zakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zakakatemu|zakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zakakateya|zakakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizakakaterom|gokizakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizakakatemu|gokizakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizakakateya|gokizakakateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zĂŠkĂŠte|zĂŠkĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zĂŠkĂŠtesher|zĂŠkĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m|zĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠkĂŠtero|zĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|zĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|zĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠkĂŠtero|gokizĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|gokizĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozĂŠkĂŠnkerom|gozĂŠkĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozĂŠkĂŠnkeya|gozĂŠkĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠkĂŠterom|zĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠkĂŠtemu|zĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zĂŠkĂŠteya|zĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠkĂŠterom|gokizĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠkĂŠtemu|gokizĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizĂŠkĂŠteya|gokizĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafkafte|zafkafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zafkaftesher|zafkaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafkaftesherĂ«m|zafkaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafkaftero|zafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafkafteshĂ«|zafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafkafteshĂ«m|zafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafkaftero|gokizafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafkafteshĂ«|gokizafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafkafteshĂ«m|gokizafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozafkafnkerom|gozafkafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafkafnkeshĂ«|gozafkafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafkafnkeshĂ«m|gozafkafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozafkafnkeya|gozafkafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafkafterom|zafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafkaftemu|zafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zafkafteya|zafkafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafkafterom|gokizafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafkaftemu|gokizafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizafkafteya|gokizafkafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
